diagrams.title: Basic Use Case Diagram Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental layout of a use case diagram with system boundary, actors, and use cases
elements: Association lines (solid lines connecting actors to use cases)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the basic notation and layout of use case diagrams in UML

diagrams.title: Use Case Relationships
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the three types of relationships: Include, Extend, and Generalization
elements: <<include>> stereotype (dashed arrow to included use case)
<<extend>> stereotype (dashed arrow from extension to base)
Generalization (solid arrow with triangle to parent)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how to show reusable and extended behavior in use case diagrams

diagrams.title: Use Case Description Template
diagrams.description: Standard template structure for writing detailed use case descriptions
diagrams.purpose: Template for writing consistent and complete use case descriptions

visuals.title: Developing Use Cases
visuals.description: Visual diagram for developing use cases
